_comments: Rename this file to config.json and fill in your values.
githubToken: Create a fine-grained token at https://github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope
repo: Repository in owner/name format, e.g. 'mojoaar/memorai-data'
url: Canonical URL of your deployment, e.g. 'https://notes.example.com'
title: Browser tab title, e.g. 'My Notes' (leave empty for default)
description: Meta description for SEO/sharing, e.g. 'Personal knowledge base'
